title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Volkswagen India Logistics - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Volkswagen India Logistics - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Volkswagen India Logistics invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Distribution Manager at our Tiruchirappalli location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Volkswagen India Logistics:
Volkswagen India Logistics is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in SAP SCM

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Volkswagen India Logistics!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
